entity.summary: Amsterdam-founded centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in 2018 and authorised by the Dutch Authority for the Financial Markets as a crypto-asset service provider under MiCA in June 2025.
entity.notes: Official Bitvavo materials consistently identify Amsterdam and 2018 as the founding place and year. The reviewed sources do not establish an exact launch day, so January 1 remains a year-level marker. The June 27, 2025 MiCA announcement is stored as a regulatory milestone.

expected.summary: Netherlands-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the Bitvavo brand.

changes.summary: Amsterdam-founded centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in 2018 and authorised by the Dutch Authority for the Financial Markets as a crypto-asset service provider under MiCA in June 2025.
changes.notes: Official Bitvavo materials consistently identify Amsterdam and 2018 as the founding place and year. The reviewed sources do not establish an exact launch day, so January 1 remains a year-level marker. The June 27, 2025 MiCA announcement is stored as a regulatory milestone.

events.title: Bitvavo was founded and launched in Amsterdam in 2018
events.description: Bitvavo was founded in Amsterdam and launched its cryptocurrency trading platform in 2018.
events.notes: The reviewed official sources establish the year but not an exact launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

events.title: Bitvavo announced Dutch MiCA authorisation
events.description: Bitvavo announced that the Dutch Authority for the Financial Markets had authorised Bitvavo B.V. as a crypto-asset service provider under the European Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation.
events.notes: The authorisation permits regulated custody and administration, operation of a trading platform, and crypto-asset transfer services under the harmonised European framework.

evidence.title: About Bitvavo
evidence.notes: The official company page states that Bitvavo was founded in Amsterdam in 2018.

evidence.title: What is Bitvavo?
evidence.notes: The official help article states that Bitvavo launched in 2018.

evidence.title: Bitvavo obtains MiCA licence from the Dutch Authority for the Financial Markets
evidence.notes: Bitvavo's announcement confirms Dutch MiCA authorisation and the resulting ability to provide services across the European Economic Area.

evidence.title: What Bitvavo's MiCAR licence means
evidence.notes: The official help article describes the services covered by the MiCA authorisation.

evidence.title: Bitvavo official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current Bitvavo identity, active trading platform, and current MiCA-authorised status.
